features: Antibacterial Aloe Vera hand wash works in seconds to help Clean, Care and Protect
Works in seconds to effectively clean, care and protect hands
Complex Complete, antibacterial Aloe Vera hand wash works in seconds to help Clean, Care and Protect, so you and your family can feel free to live life hands on
description: Product Description Carex is the leading handwash brand in the UK - with a range of products to cater for all your hand-cleansing needs. carex range has been developed with anti-bacterial formulations that combat food odours, leaving hands feeling really clean. carex scientists have put special care into the creation of products to ensure that formulations are gentle enough for use by the whole family, so you can have confidence that your hands will be as clean as they can be after using Carex. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Glycerin, Polyquaternium-7, Parfum, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Potassium Sorbate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool, CI 42051, CI 47005 Directions Preparation: Directions: Use 2 pumps, a little warm water, wash for 15 seconds, then rinse. Safety Warning Warning: Avoid contact with natural stone surfaces and stainless steel. Manufacturer's Description Carex is the leading handwash brand in the UK - with a range of products to cater for all your hand-cleansing needs. Our range has been developed with anti-bacterial formulations that combat food odours, leaving hands feeling really clean. Our scientists have put special care into the creation of our products to ensure that our formulations are gentle enough for use by the whole family, so you can have confidence that your hands will be as clean as they can be after using Carex. Manufacturer Contact Information Freepost RSGU-JUZT-ZCJU, PZ Cussons (UK) Ltd., Manchester, M22 5TG. www.carex.co.uk See more
